sha_binding.note: Branch HEAD SHA — will be updated to merge SHA post-merge

changes: Added InvariantEvaluator interface — structural typing, no cross-package dep
ReplayLifecycleRunner constructor accepts optional { invariantEngine, replayRunId }
runInvariantCheck() calls evaluateForReplay() post-transition; any violation throws
assertWriterAuthority(): fail-closed on empty/invalid role (was silent no-op)
validateWrite(): fail-closed on empty role or empty field list (was silent no-op)
validateInvariants standalone no-op removed; replaced by runInvariantCheck() instance method

adversarial_scenarios: ADVERSARIAL: violating engine halts replay — result is failure with validationPassed=false
ADVERSARIAL: violated pick is NOT written to store when invariant fires
